name: office-website
description: Serverless Office: Edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint entirely in-browser via WebAssembly. 100% Client-side, No Backend, Maximum Privacy. 纯浏览器版 Office 套件： 基于 WebAssembly 技术，支持 Word、Excel、PPT 及 PDF 编辑。数据完全本地处理，零服务端上传，守护绝对隐私。
readme_summary: This repository provides a serverless, client-side Office suite that allows users to edit Word, Excel, and PowerPoint documents directly in their browser using WebAssembly. It prioritizes user privacy by processing all data locally, with no backend interaction required.
primary_use_case: To provide a private, in-browser document editing solution for common office file formats, eliminating the need for server-side processing.
cover_image_prompt: A digital alchemist in a clean, modern laboratory, meticulously transforming raw, unformatted data streams (represented by glowing, abstract shapes) into perfectly formed Word documents, Excel spreadsheets, and PowerPoint presentations. The alchemist uses a large, transparent browser window as their workbench, with subtle WebAssembly symbols shimmering around their tools. The output documents float elegantly, showcasing their structured content. Small, unobtrusive UI elements displaying file icons and privacy locks are visible on the workbench. The scene is brightly lit with a focus on clarity and precision, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a clean, minimalist aesthetic.

name: mcp-server
description: An MCP server for interacting with the Financial Datasets stock market API.
readme_summary: This Python repository provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes financial data from Financial Datasets. It allows AI assistants like Claude to access and retrieve various financial statements, stock prices, and company news through a defined interface.
key_features: Provides access to income statements, balance sheets, and cash flow statements.
Enables retrieval of current and historical stock prices.
Fetches company news and available crypto tickers.
Integrates with AI assistants via MCP.
primary_use_case: To serve as a bridge for AI assistants to access and query real-time and historical financial market data through a standardized MCP interface.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old librarian in a bustling, futuristic library, meticulously organizing and retrieving glowing financial scrolls from an infinite digital archive. One scroll, labeled 'Income Statement,' is handed to a curious AI assistant represented by a floating, ethereal orb. Other orbs are shown receiving 'Stock Prices' and 'Company News' scrolls. Subtle holographic displays around the librarian show stock tickers and data charts. The repository name 'MCP Server' is subtly etched on a nearby digital bookshelf. The scene is rendered in a warm, inviting digital painting style with clear outlines and a focus on the interaction between the librarian and the AI orbs, emphasizing clarity and accessibility of financial information.

name: react-pdf
readme_summary: React-pdf/renderer is a React renderer for creating PDF documents on both the browser and server. It allows developers to build PDFs using React components and styling, similar to how they build web UIs.
key_features: Create PDF files using React components
primary_use_case: Generating PDF documents programmatically using React components for both client-side and server-side applications.
cover_image_prompt: A master architect in a digital workshop, meticulously constructing a detailed blueprint of a PDF document using building blocks that represent React components. The blueprint materializes from lines of code and glowing digital particles. On one side, raw data streams in, and on the other, a perfectly formed PDF document emerges. The scene is clean and modern, with subtle UI elements showing code snippets and layout previews. The overall style is a 3D isometric illustration with a vibrant, tech-inspired color palette, emphasizing the creation and structure of digital documents.

name: opencode
readme_summary: OpenCode is an open-source AI coding agent designed to assist developers. It provides a command-line interface and a desktop application for seamless integration into development workflows, offering AI-powered coding assistance.
key_features: Multiple installation methods (curl, npm, scoop, choco, Homebrew, pacman, AUR, mise, nix)
primary_use_case: To provide developers with an AI-powered coding assistant through a user-friendly interface, streamlining the development process.
cover_image_prompt: A wise old owl, perched on a stack of glowing code books, is meticulously crafting a complex blueprint with a quill that emits streams of digital light. The blueprint itself is transforming into a vibrant, fully-formed application interface. Small, stylized icons representing different programming languages float around the owl. The background is a softly lit, modern workshop with subtle circuit board patterns. The overall mood is one of intelligent creation and assistance. The image should be in a 3D isometric illustration style, with a clean composition and a color palette of deep blues, purples, and glowing gold accents, emphasizing the 'intelligent agent' aspect.

name: Load-Monitor
description: Rust daemon that monitors CPU/RAM usage and auto-throttles resource-hungry processes using cgroups v2. Features rule-based limits, blacklist support, and real-time process monitoring.
readme_summary: Load-Monitor is a Rust-based daemon for Linux that automatically throttles resource-intensive processes using cgroups v2. It monitors CPU and RAM usage, applying configurable rules to limit or terminate processes that exceed defined thresholds.
key_features: Real-time system metrics collection (CPU, memory, load average)
CPU and memory restriction via cgroups v2
primary_use_case: Automated resource management and throttling of runaway processes on Linux systems with cgroups v2 enabled.
cover_image_prompt: A vigilant digital shepherd in a stylized, minimalist landscape, using glowing lassos made of data streams to gently corral unruly, brightly colored 'process' sheep that are overconsuming resources (indicated by them glowing red and expanding). The shepherd guides them into a designated 'cgroup pen' where their energy is visibly contained and regulated. Subtle UI elements showing CPU and memory graphs are integrated into the landscape. The overall mood is one of controlled order and system stability. 3D isometric illustration style, clean lines, vibrant but controlled color palette, focus on the metaphor of gentle, automated control.
